title: Copilot
subtitle: Ask about the analysis or explore a new scenario — grounded in the engine, never invented.
placeholder: Ask about the options, or describe a scenario (e.g. "what if I increase GP-1142 to 150?")
empty: Start a conversation about this plant's scheduling.
emptyData: Ask a question — the grounded analysis appears here.
groundedHint: The deterministic analysis this answer is grounded in — the source of truth.
degraded: Degraded — the model couldn't process this turn; the data is still available.
